title: UT-Austin-RPL/OKAMI
abstract:
OKAMI: Teaching Humanoid Robots Manipulation Skills through Single Video Imitation

# OKAMI_release ## Installation Run the following command in root directory to install packages and third parties: Set your `OPENAI_API_KEY` in the environment variables. ### Vision modules You need to first download some smpl models from official websites: 1. Please visit the [MANO website](https://mano.is.tue.mpg.de/) and register to get access to the downloads sections. Download MANO models and put `MANO_RIGHT.pkl` in folder `configs/smpl_models/mano`. Download smplh models and put TODO. 2. Please visit the [SMPLX website](https://smpl-x.is.tue.mpg.de/) and register to get access to the downloads sections. Download SMPLX models and put `SMPLX_NEUTRAL.npz` in folder `configs/smpl_models/smplx`. Create a new environment for human body reconstruction from videos. Run the following command in root directory to install packages and third parties: For common trouble-shooting in this part, you can refer to [this](https://github.com/vye16/slahmr/issues). ## Stage 1: Reference Manipulation Plan Generation Record an rgbd human video, and save it as an hdf5 file with the following structure: Put the hdf5 file in folder `datasets/rgbd`. Example hdf5 files can be downloaded from [here](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1pA-fp_fnwdxLCLEfESq-NelgQRAJbgGi?usp=sharing). Then simply run `sh run_plan_generation.sh HDF5_FILE_PATH`, where `HDF5_FILE_PATH` is the path to the hdf5 file you just saved. Or, you can run the following commands step by step: All results will be saved to the annotation folder `annotations/human_demo/DEMO_NAME/`. ## Stage 2: Object-aware retargeting Run the following command to simulate the object-aware retargeting process. Currently support two simulation environments: HumanoidPour and HumanoidDrawer. The HumanoidPour environment is used for `salt_demo.hdf5`, and the HumanoidDrawer environment is used for `drawer_demo.hdf5`. where `SIMULATION_ENVIRONMENT` can be either `HumanoidPour` or `HumanoidDrawer`. The resulting rollout trajectories will be saved
abstract_zh: OKAMI 是一个通过单段人类视频教会人形机器人操作技能的系统。它分为两个阶段：首先从 RGB-D 人类视频生成参考操作计划，然后通过物体感知的重定向将人类动作映射到机器人上，使其能够执行如倒液体和开抽屉等任务。该系统利用现成的视觉和运动模型，无需大量机器人数据即可实现技能迁移。
tldr_zh: 通过单段人类视频教会人形机器人操作技能的新系统
cover_zh: 看一遍就会｜人形机器人看人类视频学倒水开抽屉

judge.reason: 单视频模仿学习人形操作，含全身重定向与仿真验证，方向前沿
